programme.title: Death By Fame
programme.desc: (M) When a fashion designer is found dead at an exclusive members-only hotel, the police must investigate the crime and find the person behind it.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: (M) The stabbing of a star punter devastates the University of Northern Colorado football team. What seems like a random tragedy unfolds as a calculated take-down.

programme.title: Undercover Underage
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
